# RaBe Cat Landing Page

The overengineered intranet landing page for Radio Bern RaBe. Serves configurable
links over a JSON API, renders a Jinja2 HTML template, and ships a service worker
for offline support. Built with Quart (async ASGI) and delivered as a container image.

## Guide

- [Getting Started](https://radiorabe.github.io/cat-page/getting-started/)
- [Configuration](https://radiorabe.github.io/cat-page/configuration/)

## Development

- [Contributing](https://radiorabe.github.io/cat-page/contributing/)
